en: are, but I told them I wouldn't bring them to you unless I could put the cuffs on you
ko: 하지만 내가 너에게 수갑을 채울 수 없다면 데려가지 않겠다고 말했어.
ja: でも自分で手錠をかけられなければ持ってこないと言った。
zhTW: 但我告訴他們，除非我能親自給你戴上手銬，否則我不會帶東西給你。
vi: Nhung toi da noi voi ho la toi se khong mang chung cho ban tru khi toi tu tay cong ban.

en: myself. Oh, you have a gun? You have a gun? No gun? No. No gun. And you tell me what,
ja: 銃ある?銃なし?ない。銃なし。
zhTW: 你有槍嗎？沒有槍？沒有。沒有槍。
vi: Ban co sung khong? Khong co sung? Khong. Khong co sung.

en: there's uh, there's two dozen French police officers out there right now on Christmas
ko: 지금 크리스마스 이브에 프랑스 경찰이 두 다스나 나와 있다는 거야?
ja: クリスマスイブに外にフランス警察が2ダースいる。
zhTW: 聖誕夜外面有兩打法國警察。
vi: Co hai ta canh sat Phap o ngoai kia ngay dem Giang sinh.

en: Eve, is that what you're telling me? Yeah. Alright, alright. Well, there's no windows
ja: それを言ってるのか?ああ。わかった。わかった。
zhTW: 你是這麼告訴我的？是的。好吧。好吧。
vi: Do la nhung gi ban noi voi toi? Uh. Duoc roi. Duoc roi.

en: here. I'm gonna take a look out the front door. No, no! I told him I'd walk out first
ko: 앞문 밖을 좀 볼게. 안 돼. 안 돼.
ja: 正面のドアから外を見る。いや、だめだ。
vi: Toi se nhin ra cua truoc. Khong. Khong.

en: and give a signal. Here, you can put these on yourself. No! I can't do that. I can't
zhTW: 不。我不能那樣做。我不能。
vi: Khong. Toi khong the lam vay. Toi khong the.

en: do that. You know why? Because I think you're full of s***. I don't think there's anyone
ja: 外には誰もいないと思う。俺とお前だけだ。
zhTW: 我不認為外面還有其他人，我覺得只有我和你。
vi: Toi khong nghi co ai khac o ngoai, toi nghi chi co toi va ban.

en: else out there. I think it's just me and you. That's right. I think it's just me and you,
ja: 外には誰もいないと思う。俺とお前だけだ。
zhTW: 我不認為外面還有其他人，我覺得只有我和你。
vi: Toi khong nghi co ai khac o ngoai, toi nghi chi co toi va ban.

en: and you know what? You're gonna have to catch me yourself. We don't have time for this.
ja: 自分で捕まえないといけない。
vi: Ban se phai tu bat toi.

en: That's good. That's good. Tell me what you want me to see, huh? I wouldn't lie to you.
zhTW: 告訴我你想讓我看什麼？
vi: Noi cho toi biet ban muon toi thay gi?

en: Look, you're wearing a wedding ring. You're wearing a wedding ring, Carl! You lied to
ja: 結婚指輪をしてるだろ、カール。それについて嘘をついた。
zhTW: 你戴著結婚戒指，Carl。你對我撒了謊。
vi: Ban deo nhan cuoi, Carl. Ban da noi doi toi ve dieu do.

en: me about that! You lied about that! You asked me if I had a family. I did. But I don't anymore.
ko: 너가 나에게 가족이 있냐고 물었지. 있었어.
ja: 家族がいるか聞いたよな。いたんだ。
zhTW: 你問我有沒有家人。我有。
vi: Ban hoi toi co gia dinh khong. Toi co.
